archetype: Warm Earthy Dark (Archetype 1 adapted for dark mode)
target_audience: Diabetics (including older demographics) managing daily carbohydrate intake

bottom_tab_navigator.style: bg-surface border-t border-border h-20 pb-5 pt-3

input_field.label: text-sm text-text-secondary font-bold uppercase tracking-wider
input_field.input: bg-input border border-border rounded-2xl h-14 px-4 text-text-primary text-lg focus:border-primary

ration_selector.button_default: flex-1 h-14 bg-surface border border-border rounded-2xl items-center justify-center
ration_selector.button_active: flex-1 h-14 bg-primary border-primary rounded-2xl items-center justify-center

result_card.container: bg-surface border border-primary/30 rounded-3xl p-6 mt-6 items-center flex-col
result_card.label: text-primary text-sm font-bold uppercase tracking-wider mb-2

history_card.container: bg-surface rounded-3xl p-4 flex flex-row items-center gap-4 mb-4 border border-border
history_card.title: text-lg font-bold text-text-primary
history_card.subtitle: text-sm text-text-secondary

warning_message.container: bg-error/10 border border-error/20 rounded-2xl p-4 mt-4 flex flex-row gap-3 items-start

photo_picker.container: h-32 w-full bg-input border-2 border-dashed border-border rounded-3xl items-center justify-center mb-4

icons_strategy.style: Regular or Fill weight for solid shapes. Avoid ultra-thin icons.

usage.favorite: Star (Fill for active, Regular for inactive)

animation_and_interactions.button_press: Scale down to 0.95 with smooth spring animation
animation_and_interactions.screen_transition: Standard React Navigation slide or fade
animation_and_interactions.calculation_result: Number counter animation or subtle pop scale effect when value updates

accessibility.contrast: Exceeds WCAG AA standards. High contrast mode ready.
accessibility.touch_targets: All interactive elements are at least 48x48px.
accessibility.typography: Dynamic Type support required for visually impaired users.
accessibility.test_ids: MANDATORY on all buttons, inputs, list items, and result displays for automated testing.

empty_state_history.description: Dark, moody top view of fresh vegetables to use as a beautiful empty state background or placeholder.

placeholder_food_image.description: Colorful vegetables on dark background. Fallback image if user takes no photo.

instructions_to_main_agent: This is an Expo React Native application. Use standard React Native View/Text components mapped to these Tailwind classes (using NativeWind or similar).
Apply 'font-heading' (Outfit) to numerical results and large titles for friendly personality.
Ensure the mathematical logic is exactly as requested: Total Carbs = (Product Weight / 100) * (Carbs per 100g).
Ration calculation logic: If user selects X rations (which requires X * 10g carbs), calculate the Grams of Product needed = (X * 10 * 100) / Carbs per 100g.
If 'Grams of Product needed' > 'Total Product Weight', trigger the Warning Message component dynamically.
Do NOT use pure #000000 background. The background must be the warm dark charcoal (#161413) provided.
Include an 'Add to History' button on the Calculator screen so the entered data can be saved with the Photo.
Use Phosphor icons (if possible) or Lucide icons with 24px-28px sizing for legibility.
Ensure all inputs have `data-testid` (or `testID` in React Native) formatted properly.
